text.title: Quality-Attribute Trade-off Analysis Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure applying the trade-off-quality-attributes methodology end-to-end. Each step lists inputs, action, output, and optional decision gate.

step.name: load-scenarios
step.action: Pull scenarios for each attribute in scope.

step.name: identify-conflicts
step.action: Pair scenarios across attributes; mark genuine conflicts.

step.name: locate-sensitivity-points
step.action: Identify components / decisions where small change moves multiple attributes.

step.name: author-resolution-rules
step.action: Define quantified resolution rules per conflict.

step.name: classify-risks-and-nonrisks
step.action: Mark unresolved trade-offs as risks; aligned pairs as non-risks.

step.name: publish-report
step.action: Compose ATAM-style report; review with stakeholders.
